detaileddescription.para: ID of the main process, only used as sender ID, e.g. for shell input

briefdescription.para: ID of the LTE connector task.
ID of the MQTT connector task.
ID of the HTTP connector task.
ID of the LTE monitor task.
ID of the Si705x temperature sensor task (5)
ID of the Shtcx temperature and humidity sensor task.
ID of the Bme68x temperature sensor task.
ID of the Adxl37x acceleration sensor task.
ID of the ADXL store task.
ID of the RMS store task (10)
ID of the ADXL RMS task.
ID of the AD converter task.
ID of the NTC task.
ID of the battery manager task.
ID of the data manager task (15)
ID of the power manager task.
ID of the boost converter task.
ID of the metrics task.
ID of the firmware update task.
ID of the firmware update control task.
ID of the reset control task (20)
ID of the demo task.
ID of the HW metrics task.
ID of the displacement task.
ID of the modbus message receiver task.

detaileddescription.para: Last entry, indicating the number of mailboxes in the system

briefdescription.para: Enumeration with all maibox ID's of the system.
The name of the mailbox.
The message queue object for masseges of type PoolElem.
The number of message slots in the mailbox.

detaileddescription.para: Array with all registered Mbox pointers, index = ID of enumerator MboxId

briefdescription.para: Mbox class constructor.

detaileddescription.para:
name
The name of the mailbox
The constructor store the name of the mailbox in private member variable myName.

briefdescription.para: Mbox class destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: Mbox read function.

detaileddescription.para:
Pointer to the received (read) message of type PoolElem
The function receive (read) the message of type PoolElem by calling the get function of the message queue class MQueue. Finally it returns a pointer to the received message.

briefdescription.para: Mbox send function.

detaileddescription.para:
elem
The message to be send
toWhom
The ID of the receiver mailbox
The function retrieve the pointer to the receiver mailbox by calling member function getMboxById and uses the pointer to call the function write with message elem of the receiver mailbox object.

briefdescription.para: Mbox register function.

detaileddescription.para:
me
Pointer to the maibox to be registered
myId
The ID of the mailbox to be registered
The function register the pointer to the mailbox by storing it in the array mBoxAll at index myId.

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve the mailbox pointer by given ID.

detaileddescription.para:
id
The ID of the mailbox
Pointer to the mailbox
The function retrieve the pointer to the mailbox by read it from array mBoxAll at index id and returns the pointer.

memberdef.argsstring: (enum msgType mType, MboxId senderId, MboxId receiverId)
memberdef.name: sendMsg

briefdescription.para: Message send convinience function.

detaileddescription.para:
mType
The message type
senderId
The ID of the sender task
receiverId
The ID of the receiver task
The function request a message from message pool, set message type to parameter mType, set senderId as sender and send message to mailbox indicated by parameter receiverId by calling static member function send.

memberdef.argsstring: (enum msgType mType, MboxId senderId, MboxId receiverId, uint8_t u8DataByte)
memberdef.name: sendMsg

briefdescription.para: Message send convinience function.

detaileddescription.para:
mType
The message type
senderId
The ID of the sender task
receiverId
The ID of the receiver task
u8DataByte
The 1 byte unsigned data to be send to receiver
The function request a message from message pool, set message type to parameter mType, set senderId as sender, copy the data byte in arbitrary byte parameter p1 and send message to mailbox indicated by parameter receiverId by calling static member function send.

memberdef.argsstring: (enum msgType mType, MboxId senderId, MboxId receiverId, int8_t s8DataByte)
memberdef.name: sendMsg

briefdescription.para: Message send convinience function.

detaileddescription.para:
mType
The message type
senderId
The ID of the sender task
receiverId
The ID of the receiver task
s8DataByte
The 1 byte signed data to be send to receiver
The function request a message from message pool, set message type to parameter mType, set senderId as sender, copy the data byte in arbitrary byte parameter p2 and send message to mailbox indicated by parameter receiverId by calling static member function send.

memberdef.argsstring: (enum msgType mType, MboxId senderId, MboxId receiverId, uint8_t *pData, uint16_t dataLen)
memberdef.name: sendMsg

briefdescription.para: Message send convinience function.

detaileddescription.para:
mType
The message type
senderId
The ID of the sender task
receiverId
The ID of the receiver task
pData
Pointer to the data to be send to receiver
dataLen
Length of the data to be send to receiver in byte
The function request a message from message pool, set message type to parameter mType, set senderId as sender, copy the data in the payload of the message by calling function putData provided by the PoolElem class and send message to mailbox indicated by parameter receiverId by calling static member function send.

memberdef.argsstring: (enum msgType mType, MboxId senderId, MboxId receiverId, const std::string &str)
memberdef.name: sendMsg

briefdescription.para: Message send convinience function.

detaileddescription.para:
mType
The message type
senderId
The ID of the sender task
receiverId
The ID of the receiver task
str
String to be send to receiver
The function request a message from message pool, set message type to parameter mType, set senderId as sender, copy the string in the payload of the message by calling function putString provided by the PoolElem class and send message to mailbox indicated by parameter receiverId by calling static member function send.

briefdescription.para: RTOS wrapper for mailbox support.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: The MBox class implements a C++ wrapper for mailbox support using the kernel message queue API provided by the Zephyr operating system. See details in Zephyr message queue documentation or in API documentation. The Mbox class provides methods to read (receive) objects of type PoolElem from the mailbox and to write (send) PoolElem objects to the mailbox. It provides an enumeration with all maibox ID's of the system, methods to register a mailbox by storing the pointer to the mailbox in an array, to retrieve the mailbox pointer by given ID Furthermore it provides a method to count the number of objects in the queue and to print statistics.
